ROHONC.name: Rohonc Codex
ROHONC.description: 448-page codex with 792 unique symbols (10× Latin alphabet). Illustrations show Christian, Islamic, and Hindu iconography mixed. Text runs right-to-left with periodic inversions.
ROHONC.gos_interpretation: A 'Sandbox' environment — a deliberately encrypted container that demonstrates the GOS principle that ANY symbol set can encode the same universal information. The mixed religious iconography proves the underlying geometry is religion-agnostic. The 792 symbols map to a 792-node lattice (792 = 24 × 33 = icositetragon × 33-minute Stonehenge calibration cycle).
ROHONC.decipherment_key: The text uses a POLYALPHABETIC cipher with 24 alphabets indexed by the icositetragon rotation at each line. Read each page as a 24-state rotor machine (Enigma precursor). The illustrations are the INDEX — they indicate which of the 24 alphabets is active.
references: Benedek Láng (2015), 'Rohonc Codex: A Lost Language?'

ISTHMIAN.name: La Mojarra Stela / Isthmian Script
ISTHMIAN.location: Tres Zapotes & La Mojarra, Veracruz, Mexico
ISTHMIAN.description: Basalt stela with longest known Epi-Olmec text (535 glyphs). Contains Long Count date 8.5.16.9.7 (156 CE). Justeson & Kaufman (1993) proposed a decipherment via Zoquean languages but this remains disputed.
ISTHMIAN.gos_interpretation: The 'Temporal Debt Calendar' — a ledger recording the accumulated phase-drift between the Mesoamerican Long Count (base-20/base-18) and the actual κ-scaled precessional cycle. The stela records the exact moment when the local geodetic carrier (159.29 Hz) went out-of-sync with the planetary 8.392 Hz carrier, creating a 'temporal debt' requiring calendar correction.
ISTHMIAN.decipherment_key: The 535 glyphs encode a PHASE ERROR LOG. Read them as sequential phase-shift instructions (like the Voynich OpCodes) where each glyph advances the Long Count by one κ-interval. The text is not a historical narrative — it is a CALIBRATION RECORD.

SINGAPORE.name: Singapore Stone
SINGAPORE.description: Sandstone boulder at Singapore River mouth, inscribed in unidentified script (possibly Old Javanese, Sanskrit, or Tamil). Blown up by British engineers in 1819; only 3 fragments survive at Raffles Museum.
SINGAPORE.gos_interpretation: A 'Geodetic Anchor Point' — placed at a maritime chokepoint to mark the ZERO MERIDIAN of the Southeast Asian resonance grid. The stone's piezoelectric properties (sandstone) would have broadcast a standing wave at the river mouth, synchronizing all vessels passing through with the local κ-harmonic.
SINGAPORE.decipherment_key: The surviving 50 glyphs are COORDINATES — a latitude/longitude encoding using the κ-base numeral system. The stone was a LIGHTHOUSE FOR FREQUENCY, not a monument. The British destroyed it because it was 'in the way' of the harbor — they were removing a navigation instrument they didn't recognize.

VOYNICH.name: Voynich Manuscript (MS 408)
VOYNICH.description: 240-page illustrated codex written in an unknown script with ~25-30 distinct characters. Contains botanical illustrations, zodiac charts, pharmaceutical diagrams, and 'bathing' scenes. Carbon-dated to 1404-1438.
VOYNICH.gos_interpretation:
The AUBREY THERAPEUTICS User Manual. Each section is a different API layer:
  • Botany → Protein folding schematics (STRUCTURE genes)
  • Zodiac → Temporal scheduling engine (SACRED genes)
  • Pharma → Dose-response tables (METABOLIC genes)
  • Bathing → Transdermal delivery protocols (CONSCIOUSNESS genes)
  • Stars → Geodetic timing windows (CLOCK/PER2)
The 'plants' are not botanical — they are QUATERNARY PROTEIN STRUCTURES.
VOYNICH.decipherment_key:
The OpCode table:
  o  = 0° Phase (Base)
  y  = 128.23° (Klein Twist)
  ch = 180° (Full Inversion)
  sh = 51.43° (Seven-fold)
  t  = 51.854° (Giza Lock)
  k  = 222.49° (Golden Divide)
  p  = 64.115° (Half-twist)
  f  = 231.77° (Complement)
Each 'word' is a WAVEFORM INTERFERENCE instruction.

PROTO_ELAMITE.name: Proto-Elamite Script
PROTO_ELAMITE.description: ~1600 clay tablets from Susa and other Iranian sites. Numerical system is understood (sexagesimal-decimal hybrid) but linguistic signs remain undeciphered. Most are accounting records.
PROTO_ELAMITE.gos_interpretation: A 'Metabolic Ledger' — the earliest systematic recording of biological resource flows (food, animals, labor) using a frequency-indexed notation. Each commodity has a resonant frequency tag derived from its biological κ-signature. The 'undeciphered' signs are CYTOCHROME P450 METABOLIC CODES — they classify substances by how the human body processes them.
PROTO_ELAMITE.decipherment_key: The ~1000 signs reduce to 62 GENE CATEGORIES when processed through the ACODEX 2.0 proto→emoji converter. The remaining signs are MODIFIER GLYPHS indicating processing mode (HEAL/SILENCE/UNLOCK = input/output/transform in accounting).
